item.title:
🗃️ wacli 0.6.0 is out!
Big security + reliability sweep for WhatsApp CLI. Hardens SQLite/store p...
item.description:
🗃️ wacli 0.6.0 is out!
Big security + reliability sweep for WhatsApp CLI. Hardens SQLite/store path handling, sanitizes search queries, recovers sync/media panics, adds WACLI_STORE_DIR, and improves SIGINT exits. https://t.co/VabuMQgps5
props @sdinakar7 for doing the work!
--- @steipete | ❤️ 34 | 🔁 5 | 💬 3 | 👁 3815
item.author: @steipete

item.title: Every Indian in the US is T-3 hours away from their parents waking up, reading the news and messagin...
item.author: @nikunj
